home.heroTitle: Plan meals, shop smarter, waste less.
home.heroText: VivaPantry connects your pantry, recipes, receipts, prices, and meal plans so your household knows what to cook and what to buy.
home.flowAria: VivaPantry Plan Shop Store Cook Repeat flow
home.trustNote: No medical advice. No diet promises. Practical household planning support.
home.previewMealText: Built from pantry staples, budget, and household preferences
home.loopTitle: A practical loop for the food you already buy.
home.loopText: VivaPantry connects the everyday steps of household food planning, from what came home in the grocery bag to what should go on next week's list.
home.loopBenefit: Reduce duplicate purchases and food waste with a clearer view of what you have and what you need.

receipts.title: Receipts
receipts.text: Scan receipts to capture purchases and prices.

prices.title: Prices
prices.text: Keep grocery price history organized over time.

pantry.title: Pantry
pantry.text: See what is stocked, low, or likely to be duplicated.

mealPlans.title: Meal Plans
mealPlans.text: Generate weekly meal ideas from recipes and preferences.

shoppingLists.title: Shopping Lists
shoppingLists.text: Create shopping lists from pantry gaps and planned meals.

home.featuresTitle: Everything a weekly planning routine needs.

pantryTracking.title: Pantry tracking
pantryTracking.text: Keep pantry staples, quantities, and low-stock items organized so planning starts with what is already at home.

receiptScanning.title: Receipt scanning
receiptScanning.text: Turn receipts into useful grocery records for purchases, prices, and pantry updates.

aiMealPlanning.title: AI meal planning
aiMealPlanning.text: Create practical meal ideas from your recipes, preferences, pantry context, and weekly goals.

groceryLists.title: Grocery lists
groceryLists.text: Build focused shopping lists from planned meals and pantry gaps instead of starting from scratch.

recipes.title: Recipe organization
recipes.text: Save recipes, ingredients, and instructions so favorite meals can become reusable planning building blocks.

householdPreferences.title: Household preferences
householdPreferences.text: Plan around household size, cooking time, dietary notes, regional settings, and practical weeknight needs.

home.readinessTitle: Built for weekly planning, real groceries, and real households.
home.readinessText: VivaPantry is designed for weekly planning routines, not one-off inspiration. It keeps grocery and meal data organized so the next shopping decision is easier to make.
home.readinessCta: Coming soon on Android and iOS

readiness.receiptScans: Receipt scans can improve pantry and price history
readiness.shoppingLists: Shopping lists stay focused on what you still need

home.trustText: Review how VivaPantry handles privacy, terms, support, and account deletion.

privacy.title: Your data should support your kitchen, not surprise you.
privacy.lead: This policy explains what VivaPantry collects, why we use it, and how to contact us about privacy or deletion requests.
privacy.sections: Information we collect||VivaPantry may collect and process information you provide or generate while using the app, including:||Account information, such as email address and authentication details.|Household preferences, dietary notes, regional settings, cooking goals, household size, budget preferences, and meal planning preferences.|Pantry items, products, quantities, grocery lists, recipes, recipe ingredients, recipe instructions, meal plans, and cooking records.|Receipts, receipt images, recipe images, extracted receipt items, price history, and related shopping records.|Location and store data, such as profile city, optional approximate device location, pasted Google Maps links, selected stores, store addresses, Google Place IDs, and Maps/Places lookup logs.|Billing and entitlement data, such as plan status, product IDs, purchase verification metadata, and subscription entitlement state.|Usage logs, diagnostics, app analytics, error logs, AI request metadata, Google Maps/Places request metadata, and support logs used to operate and improve the service.|||How we use information||We use app data to provide core features: pantry tracking, receipt scanning, grocery lists, recipe organization, AI meal planning, store lookup, support, security, debugging, subscription verification, and service improvement.|||Service providers||VivaPantry uses Supabase for backend services such as authentication, database, storage, and serverless functions. We may use AI providers such as OpenAI to process meal planning, receipt, recipe, grocery, or extraction requests. We may use Google services for Maps/Places store lookup, optional Google Drive storage, and Google Play Billing verification. We may also use app analytics and error logging tools to understand reliability and diagnose problems.|||AI processing||When you use AI-powered features, relevant pantry, recipe, preference, receipt, grocery, or planning context may be sent to AI providers to generate results. We aim to send only the information needed for the requested feature. AI outputs may be incomplete or incorrect, so users should review allergy, nutrition, pricing, product availability, and cooking-safety output before relying on it.|||Google API data||When you use Google Maps/Places features, relevant request data may be sent to Google, including search text, pasted Maps links, place identifiers, selected store details, and approximate coordinates for nearby search. When you connect Google Drive, VivaPantry uses Drive data only for the storage workflow you enable. When you purchase through Google Play, purchase and entitlement data is used to verify access to paid features. We do not sell Google API data or use it for advertising, data brokerage, credit decisions, or unrelated profiling.|||Data retention and deletion||We keep information as needed to provide the app, comply with legal obligations, resolve issues, prevent abuse, and maintain security. You can request account and data deletion by contacting us. Deletion may include account data, pantry items, recipes, grocery lists, receipts, preferences, household data, connected storage records, and related app data. Some limited records may be retained where required for security, legal, fraud prevention, billing, or operational reasons.|||Contact||For privacy questions or deletion requests, email support@vivapantry.com.

terms.title: Terms for practical household planning.
terms.lead: These terms describe the basic rules for using VivaPantry. By using the app or website, you agree to use the service responsibly.
terms.sections: Use of the service||VivaPantry helps with grocery, pantry, recipe, receipt scanning, store lookup, optional cloud storage, and meal planning workflows. You are responsible for the information you enter and the choices you make from app suggestions.|||Account responsibility||You are responsible for maintaining access to your account, protecting your login details, and ensuring the information in your household profile is accurate.|||No medical or nutritional diagnosis||VivaPantry provides planning support only. It does not provide medical advice, nutritional diagnosis, allergy diagnosis, treatment recommendations, or guaranteed health outcomes.|||Allergies and dietary restrictions||You are responsible for reviewing all recipes, ingredients, labels, allergens, dietary restrictions, and health decisions before buying, cooking, or eating food.|||AI and app suggestions||AI-generated meal ideas, grocery lists, receipt extraction, recipe imports, pantry setup guidance, and app suggestions may be incomplete or incorrect. Review outputs before relying on them, especially for allergies, nutrition, pricing, product availability, store information, and cooking safety.|||Location, maps, and third-party services||Some features may use approximate location, pasted Google Maps links, selected store details, Google Maps/Places, Google Drive, Google Play Billing, AI providers, cloud infrastructure, or other third-party services. Their terms and availability may affect app features. You may not use VivaPantry to misuse Google data, scrape or redistribute Maps/Places data, bypass usage limits, or violate provider terms.|||Subscriptions||Certain features may require a paid subscription. Billing, renewals, cancellations, refunds, trials, and store purchase flows are handled by the relevant app store or payment provider under their policies. Access to premium features may change if payment fails or subscription status changes.|||Changes and contact||We may update these terms as the product evolves. Questions can be sent to support@vivapantry.com.

support.title: We are here to help.
support.lead: For VivaPantry support, email support@vivapantry.com and include the account email you use in the app.
support.sections: Contact||Email support@vivapantry.com for help with the app, your account, or data deletion requests.|||Login help||If you cannot sign in, include the email address used for your VivaPantry account and a short description of what happened. Do not send passwords.|||Receipts||For receipt scanning issues, describe the store, the receipt format, and whether the problem was image upload, item extraction, or price matching.|||Meal plans||For meal plan issues, tell us whether the plan was generated by AI or created manually, and what result you expected.|||Grocery lists||For grocery list issues, mention whether the item came from a recipe, meal plan, receipt, or manual entry.|||Google and third-party services||For Google Maps, Google Drive, Google Play, or other third-party issues, describe the feature you used, the approximate time, the store/link/account involved if relevant, and any visible error message. Do not send passwords, API keys, access tokens, or full payment details.|||Account deletion||You can request deletion from the Delete Account page or by emailing support with your app account email.

delete-account.title: VivaPantry Account Deletion
delete-account.lead: You can request deletion of your VivaPantry account and the data associated with it.
delete-account.sections:
How to request deletion||1. Send an email to support@vivapantry.com with the subject line "Delete my account".
2. Include the email address used to create your VivaPantry account.
3. Our team will confirm receipt and process the request.|||Data that will be deleted||The deletion request covers these categories:||Account information|Profile and preference data|Pantry items|Shopping lists|Recipes created or saved|Meal plans|Data associated with use of the app|||Data that may be temporarily retained||Some technical records, security logs, anti-fraud records, or information required for legal obligations may be retained for a limited period when necessary.|||Processing time||Deletion requests will be processed within 30 days after the request is confirmed.|||Questions||If you have questions, contact support@vivapantry.com.|||Portuguese version||Esta página também está disponível em português.
